scripts.deploy: aws s3 sync ./dist s3://jcc-dmc-frontend --profile serverless-deployer --delete --cache-control max-age=31536000 --exclude index.html && aws s3 cp ./dist/index.html s3://jcc-dmc-frontend/index.html --profile serverless-deployer --cache-control no-cache,no-store,must-revalidate && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name jcc-dmc-frontend --profile serverless-deployer --region ap-northeast-2 --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`CloudFrontDistributionId`].OutputValue' --output text) --paths '/*' --profile serverless-deployer
